sql: SELECT SUM(f.BRUT_PRIM_TL) AS total_üretim FROM AS_DWH.POL_POLICE_OZET p JOIN AS_DWH.FACT_POL_POLICE_EK f ON p.POLICE_ID = f.POLICE_ID WHERE TO_CHAR(p.TANZIM_TARIH_ID) = '2025' FETCH FIRST 200 ROWS ONLY
rationale_short: Toplam üretim, 2025 tanzim tarihli poliçelerin brüt prim toplamı üzerinden hesaplanır.
risk_notes: Sadece tanzim tarihi 2025 olan poliçeler dahil edilir.
description:
Question answered: What is the total production (in TL) for policies created in the year 2025?
Tables used: POL_POLICE_OZET, FACT_POL_POLICE_EK
Filters: Policies created in the year 2025
Grouping/measures: Summing the BRUT_PRIM_TL column
Expected output columns: total_üretim
Assumptions: BRUT_PRIM_TL represents the gross premium amount in Turkish Lira.

sql: SELECT SUM(f.VOP_TL) AS total_üretim FROM AS_DWH.POL_POLICE_OZET p JOIN AS_DWH.FACT_POL_POLICE_TEM_ASSET f ON p.POLICE_ID = f.POLICE_ID WHERE TO_CHAR(p.TANZIM_TARIH_ID) = '2025' FETCH FIRST 200 ROWS ONLY
rationale_short: Toplam üretim, vergi öncesi prim üzerinden 2025 tanzim tarihli poliçelerle hesaplanır.
risk_notes: Vergi öncesi prim üzerinden hesaplama, brüt primle farklılık gösterebilir.
description:
Question answered: What is the total production (in TL) for policies created in the year 2025 based on the VOP_TL field?
Tables used: POL_POLICE_OZET, FACT_POL_POLICE_TEM_ASSET
Filters: Policies created in the year 2025
Grouping/measures: Summing the VOP_TL column
Expected output columns: total_üretim
Assumptions: VOP_TL represents a specific type of production value related to policies.

sql: SELECT SUM(p.POLICE_SAYISI) AS total_üretim FROM AS_DWH.POL_POLICE_OZET p JOIN AS_DWH.POLICE_SAYISI s ON p.POLICE_ID = s.POLICE_ID WHERE TO_CHAR(p.TANZIM_TARIH_ID) = '2025' FETCH FIRST 200 ROWS ONLY
rationale_short: Toplam üretim, 2025 tanzim tarihli poliçe sayısına göre hesaplanır.
risk_notes: Sayısal bir üretim ölçütü sunar ancak finansal değerleme içermez.
description:
Question answered: What is the total number of policies created in the year 2025?
Tables used: POL_POLICE_OZET, POLICE_SAYISI
Filters: Policies created in the year 2025
Grouping/measures: Summing the POLICE_SAYISI column
Expected output columns: total_üretim
Assumptions: POLICE_SAYISI represents the count of policies.
